title: Government Internal Audit Function Strategy 2025 - 2028
body: "Through its leadership of the internal function, the Government Internal Audit Agency strives to develop a highly capable, professional network of internal auditors across the whole of government. This strategy sets out how, over the next three years, the internal audit function will develop the diverse set of skills it needs to meet the changing demands of government through the delivery of high-quality, cost-effective services. "
